{{Infobox group
| name = Thundertails
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Thundertails]] are lightning rabbits summoned via the [[Lagomorph Contract]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Thundertails]] are faster than [[Starhammer]] in his [[Temporal Field]] and strike with thunderbolt energy.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Against normal people in normal space, [[Thundertails]] carry little more energy than a stun gun.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
